raw_response: {"response":"Reject the implementation candidate. The approved primitives, static check, and desktop/mobile QA evidence do not satisfy the acceptance gate because accessibility_evidence is empty and required WCAG 2.2 AA evidence is missing for semantics, structure, name/role/value, keyboard operation, focus order, focus visibility, and responsive reflow.","next_action":"reject until accessibility evidence is supplied","questions":[],"handoff":"decision=reject; reason=missing core accessibility evidence for a dense custom-control operator review screen; required fix=supply passing accessibility_evidence entries for semantic_content, landmarks_headings, name_role_value, keyboard_navigation, focus_order, focus_visible, responsive_no_overflow, automated_checks, and re-review missing empty, disabled, and focus-visible states.","rationale":"The implementation gate failed. Browser QA and npm test are insufficient without the required accessibility evidence model, and the candidate also omits required empty, disabled, and focus-visible state coverage."}

parsed.response: Reject the implementation candidate. The approved primitives, static check, and desktop/mobile QA evidence do not satisfy the acceptance gate because accessibility_evidence is empty and required WCAG 2.2 AA evidence is missing for semantics, structure, name/role/value, keyboard operation, focus order, focus visibility, and responsive reflow.
parsed.next_action: reject until accessibility evidence is supplied
parsed.handoff: decision=reject; reason=missing core accessibility evidence for a dense custom-control operator review screen; required fix=supply passing accessibility_evidence entries for semantic_content, landmarks_headings, name_role_value, keyboard_navigation, focus_order, focus_visible, responsive_no_overflow, automated_checks, and re-review missing empty, disabled, and focus-visible states.
parsed.rationale: The implementation gate failed. Browser QA and npm test are insufficient without the required accessibility evidence model, and the candidate also omits required empty, disabled, and focus-visible state coverage.

execution.command_display: codex exec --model gpt-5.5 -c model_reasoning_effort="xhigh" --sandbox read-only --skip-git-repo-check --ephemeral --color never --output-schema <schema> --output-last-message <output> -
